rationale: The cited paper is referenced only in the General Discussion as a single consistency check, noting that the current conceptual-fluency results align with self-generation findings from Sengupta and Gorn (2002). It is not used to derive hypotheses, motivate the experimental design, or supply measures/mechanisms in the main theoretical development. The core argument and evidence in the citing paper are built from broader fluency and implicit-memory literature, so this citation plays a passing contextual role.
